items.title: Composable Core Banking Platform Release
items.description: Release of Composable Core Banking Platform improvements aimed at moving Time to Launch New Banking Products and Annual Platform Value Realized, anchored in scaling banking workflows through cleaner data, lower servicing effort, and stronger partner readiness and led through Product Configuration Engine. The quarter concentrates on data-driven banking operations, embedded-finance readiness, and lower servicing complexity so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to Launch New Banking Products
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease time to launch new banking products by improving product configuration engine and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Increase delivery speed by strengthening product configuration engine and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening product configuration engine and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Product Configuration Engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Modular Domain Architecture with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Customer and Account Migration Toolkit with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Ledger and Accounting Core with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Operations and Product Console.
Deployed workflow updates in Core Banking APIs.
Deployed workflow updates in Migration and Platform Dashboard.
